meta.title: Is this our first glimpse of America's new stealth fighter??
meta.description:
On Friday, Air Force Chief of Staff General David Allvin posted a new Air Force recruiting commercial to X/Twitter that includes a brief clip of an unusual new stealth fighter taxiing on a dark runway, offering what may be the world’s first glimpse of one of the technology demonstrators involved in the development of America’s new stealth fighter, designated the F-47.
